bot.greeting: Namaste 🙏 Dikho mein swagat hai! Aapke business ka 10 minute mein FREE Google website banayenge. Shuru karein? (Haan / Nahi)
bot.ask_name: Aapke business ka naam kya hai?
bot.ask_vertical: Aapka business kis type ka hai?
bot.ask_address: Aapke business ka address kya hai? (Location share karein ya type karein)
bot.ask_hours: Aapke business ke khaalne ke timing kya hain?
bot.ask_photos: 3 photos bhejein: 1 dukaan ke bahar, 1 andar, 1 kaam ka sample
bot.ask_language: Aapki website kis bhaasha mein honi chahiye? (Hindi / English / Hinglish)
bot.complete: Aapka website live hai! 🎉 {url} — Share kijiye apne customers ke saath!
bot.resume: Wapas aaye! Jahan chhoda tha wahan se shuru karein?
bot.stop_confirm: Theek hai. Hum yahan ruk jaate hain. Kisi bhi waqt 'hello' karein.
bot.invalid_input: Maafi chahta hoon, samajh nahi aaya. Dobara try karein.
bot.invalid_photo: Kripya ek image (JPG/PNG) bhejein. Dobara try karein.
bot.waitlist: Aap {vertical} ke waitlist mein hain! Jab available hoga tab batayenge.
bot.faq_not_found: Is baare mein thoda time lagega. Abhi setup pe chaltein hain!

errors.generic: Kuch galat ho gaya. Kripya dobara try karein.
errors.phone_invalid: Kripya ek valid 10-digit Indian mobile number enter karein.
